meaning: n.(登山运动员使用的)部镐
examples: “People are terminating their contracts with Lehman, ” said Robert G. Pickel, chief executive of the association. “People are trying to close those positions and come up with values.”
Robert Pickel, chief executive of the International Swaps and Derivatives Association, a trade group, dismisses accusations of profiteering.
The root cause of the crisis, Mr Pickel argues, is bad mortgage lending, not derivatives: swaps on subprime mortgages grew unstable because the loans themselves were dodgy.
